Off Calendar Sep-25-2003 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Robert Burch, Esq. of LAW OFFICES OF OF DANIEL BERKO 771-6174, for plaintiff and opposing party

RULING:
NO other APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. Plaintiff presented his argument. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING: DEFENDANT SITA KHUFU'S MOTION For Change Of Venue; Attorneys Fees Cost And Sanctions -- Granted; matter shall be transferred to Marin County.
